responsibilities: MERN stack used: React.js for UI, Node.js/Express.js for backend, MongoDB for storage.
Got mentorship of senior engineers from Google London, Apple, Bytedance Singapore and Alphagrep Singapore, I learned real word software development and learned about scalability.

projects.name: AlgoUniversity Project
projects.description: A Level-4 Project with industry-level tech stacks. A Level 4 project is a scalable project deployed in a production setting on a cloud platform like AWS, GCP, or Azure. It should be capable of handling a load of up to X+ simultaneous users using Horizontal Scaling. One should have a deep understanding of System Design Principles to build a Level 4 project.
